summary: Comprehensive testing of Google Classroom LMS Integration feature. All 9 required features verified. Backend API tests (30/30 passed). Frontend UI tests confirmed all 6 LMS provider cards display correctly with appropriate button states.

1_integrations_page_loads_all_providers.details: All 6 LMS providers displayed: Google Classroom, Canvas LMS, Clever, ClassLink, PowerSchool, Schoology with correct icons and descriptions.

2_google_canvas_clever_connect_enabled.details: Google Classroom, Canvas, and Clever all show enabled 'Connect' buttons. Google Classroom button text is 'Connect'.

3_coming_soon_providers_disabled.details: ClassLink, PowerSchool, and Schoology show 'Coming Soon' badge and have disabled buttons with 'Coming Soon' text.

4_get_providers_api.details: GET /api/integrations/providers returns all 6 providers with correct availability status. Available: google_classroom, canvas, clever. Coming soon: classlink, powerschool, schoology.

5_get_status_api.details: GET /api/integrations/status returns connection status for authenticated user. Shows all providers with connected=false by default.

6_post_assignments_api.details: POST /api/integrations/assignments creates game assignments. Validates class and game existence. Returns 404 for nonexistent class/game.

7_get_assignments_api.details: GET /api/integrations/assignments lists assignments for teacher. Returns empty list for new users, array format confirmed.

8_dashboard_lms_link.details: Dashboard Quick Actions section shows 'Connect LMS/SIS' link pointing to /integrations page.

9_class_detail_sync_button.details: ClassDetail page shows 'Integration' card. Sync Roster button appears only when class has Google Classroom integration (requires OAuth connection). Shows 'None' for unconnected classes - correct behavior.

mocked_apis.google_classroom_api: MOCKED - Requires real OAuth tokens for Google Classroom API calls. The integration framework, UI, and local assignment/grade tracking are fully functional.
mocked_apis.canvas_api: MOCKED - Canvas integration marked as available but not fully implemented
mocked_apis.clever_api: MOCKED - Clever integration marked as available but not fully implemented

context_for_next_testing_agent: LMS/SIS Integration feature fully tested. Key data-testids: provider-{google_classroom|canvas|clever|classlink|powerschool|schoology}, connect-{provider_id}, sync-roster-btn. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_integrations.py cover providers, status, OAuth, assignments, and Google operations. Google Classroom API calls are stubbed - they require real OAuth tokens. Frontend Integrations page displays all 6 providers correctly with Coming Soon badges on classlink/powerschool/schoology.
notes: The Google Classroom sync roster button only appears on ClassDetail when the class has google_classroom integration. Test class 'Math Class 101' shows integration='none' because it wasn't imported from Google Classroom (requires OAuth). This is expected behavior.
